properties.title: Last of the Wild Project, Version 3 (LWP-3): 2009 Human Footprint, 2018 Release
properties.description: The 2009 Human Footprint, 2018 Release provides a global map of the cumulative human pressure on the environment in 2009, at a spatial resolution of ~1 km. The human pressure is measured using eight variables including built-up environments, population density, electric power infrastructure, crop lands, pasture lands, roads, railways, and navigable waterways. The data set is produced by Venter et.al., and is available in the Mollweide projection.
keywords: EARTH SCIENCE > LAND SURFACE > LAND USE/LAND COVER
EARTH SCIENCE > BIOSPHERE > ECOSYSTEMS > ANTHROPOGENIC/HUMAN INFLUENCED ECOSYSTEMS
